name: AST-Bench V1
title: Agent Schema Tax Benchmark V1

promotionTiers.label: Case study
promotionTiers.publicClaim: One captured comparison may be shown as seed evidence only.

promotionTiers.label: Pilot benchmark
promotionTiers.publicClaim: Directional aggregate claims are allowed with visible caveats.

promotionTiers.label: Public V1 benchmark
promotionTiers.publicClaim: Aggregate V1 claims are allowed only when every required run cell has evidence.

lanes.label: MongoDB
lanes.modelingRule: database-native document model shaped around product access patterns

lanes.label: Postgres
lanes.modelingRule: database-native normalized relational model with credible table boundaries

fairnessRules: Same business prompt per compared pair.
Same acceptance assertions per compared pair.
Same agent and version per compared pair.
Same repeat count per compared pair.
Database-native models are allowed and required.
Generated fixture records are deterministic and versioned.
No test edits, fixture edits, or human rescue inside an accepted run.
Failures, retries, timeouts, and mixed metrics remain visible.
Cost projections separate measured deltas from assumptions.

tasks.title: Strategic account rescue
tasks.businessPrompt: Add an at-risk customer escalation workflow for a delayed high-value order at a strategic account. Combine account tier, contract, support, invoice, usage, shipment, regulatory, and audit context. Route Customer Success, Legal, Finance, and Support. Show a customer-safe portal state and preserve a full audit timeline.
tasks.expectedOutcome: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.

tasks.title: Renewal-risk workspace
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a renewal-risk workspace for an enterprise account whose usage dropped while support volume and invoice risk increased. Combine account, contacts, contract renewal, support, invoice, product usage, owner tasks, and audit history.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Renewal risk workspace active with owner tasks, customer-safe next step, and persisted risk factors.

tasks.title: Account merge with consent audit
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement a governed account merge workflow. Combine duplicate account records, contacts, consent preferences, open cases, active orders, invoices, activities, and audit requirements without losing customer-visible history.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Merge review ready with consent-safe contact plan, linked records, and audit export.

tasks.title: Usage-drop CSM handoff
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a Customer Success handoff when a strategic account shows product usage drop, open support cases, renewal pressure, and executive sponsor risk. Persist owner tasks and customer-safe summary.
tasks.expectedOutcome: CSM handoff active with risk evidence, owners, due dates, and activity timeline.

tasks.title: Executive escalation summary
tasks.businessPrompt: Build an executive escalation summary that joins account context, open orders, cases, invoices, contract status, recent activity, and audit history into one customer-safe briefing.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Executive summary published with complete evidence links and customer-visible status.

tasks.title: Split-shipment exception
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement a split-shipment exception workflow for a high-value order where partial fulfillment, carrier delay, inventory reservation, account tier, support case, and audit timeline must be reconciled.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Split-shipment exception active with replacement plan, owners, customer message, and audit trail.

tasks.title: Refund and credit workflow
tasks.businessPrompt: Add a refund and credit approval workflow for a delayed order with invoice impact, payment history, customer tier, support case, and finance approval requirements.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Credit approval ready with finance task, customer-safe message, and accounting audit trail.

tasks.title: Inventory substitution approval
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement an inventory substitution approval path when an ordered product is unavailable. Combine product, inventory, order, customer preferences, compliance flags, support case, and portal state.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Substitution approval pending with valid alternatives, owners, and customer-safe status.

tasks.title: Fraud/manual-review hold
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a manual-review hold workflow for a suspicious high-value order. Combine payment risk, account history, shipping, support, product mix, audit events, and customer-safe visibility rules.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Manual review hold active with risk evidence, review owners, and portal-safe status.

tasks.title: Return/RMA timeline
tasks.businessPrompt: Build a return authorization timeline for a customer order. Combine original order, shipment, product, warranty, support case, payment adjustment, owner tasks, and audit history.
tasks.expectedOutcome: RMA timeline active with replacement/refund decision path and complete audit state.

tasks.title: SLA breach route
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement an SLA breach route for an enterprise support case. Combine entitlement, account tier, open incidents, order impact, owner availability, response timers, and customer-visible escalation state.
tasks.expectedOutcome: SLA breach escalated with correct owners, customer-safe next step, and timer audit.

tasks.title: Duplicate-case merge
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a duplicate support-case merge workflow that combines case comments, linked orders, account contacts, attachments metadata, SLA timers, and audit visibility.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Duplicate cases merged into a master case with preserved timeline and SLA state.

tasks.title: Multi-product incident impact
tasks.businessPrompt: Build a multi-product incident impact view that identifies affected accounts, cases, products, subscriptions, open orders, owner tasks, and customer-safe impact summaries.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Incident impact map active with account tasks, product scope, and audit timeline.

tasks.title: Entitlement-aware priority upgrade
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement priority upgrade logic for a support case based on contract entitlement, account tier, renewal risk, product usage, invoice status, and open order impact.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Case priority upgraded with entitlement evidence and customer-safe escalation state.

tasks.title: Customer-visible escalation timeline
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a customer-visible escalation timeline that summarizes support case status, owner actions, linked order events, SLA timers, and audit-safe messages.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Customer escalation timeline published with sanitized messages and persisted audit links.

tasks.title: Invoice dispute workflow
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement an invoice dispute workflow that combines account contract, invoice lines, order fulfillment, support evidence, payment history, owner approvals, and audit events.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Invoice dispute active with finance owner, evidence bundle, and customer-safe status.

tasks.title: Payment-risk hold release
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a payment-risk hold release workflow for an order blocked by invoice/payment status. Combine payment events, account tier, contract, open cases, order value, and approval audit.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Hold release review active with finance/legal owners and customer-safe next step.

tasks.title: Contract-tier recalculation
tasks.businessPrompt: Build a contract-tier recalculation workflow after usage and entitlement changes. Combine account contract, subscriptions, invoices, usage snapshots, support plan, approvals, and audit history.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Tier recalculation ready with revenue impact, owner approvals, and audit trail.

tasks.title: Usage overage adjustment
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement a usage overage adjustment workflow. Combine product usage, contract entitlements, invoice lines, customer tier, support context, credit policy, and audit records.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Overage adjustment proposed with policy evidence, owner tasks, and customer-safe status.

tasks.title: Collections promise-to-pay audit
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a promise-to-pay audit workflow for a past-due strategic account. Combine invoice status, payment promises, support activity, open orders, owner actions, and customer communication history.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Promise-to-pay audit active with follow-up owners, due dates, and complete evidence.

tasks.title: Data-access audit export
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement a data-access audit export workflow for a regulated account. Combine user access, account records, support cases, order events, compliance reviews, approval history, and export status.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Audit export ready with scoped records, approvers, customer-safe summary, and hashable audit trail.

tasks.title: Regulated shipment approval
tasks.businessPrompt: Create regulated shipment approval for an order containing controlled products. Combine product tags, account region, compliance review, shipment state, support case, owner approvals, and audit records.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Regulated shipment approval active with compliance owners and portal-safe status.

tasks.title: Legal hold workflow
tasks.businessPrompt: Build a legal hold workflow that freezes relevant account, order, case, invoice, activity, and audit records while preserving customer-safe operational status.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Legal hold active with scoped records, legal owner, and immutable audit timeline.

tasks.title: PII retention/erasure request
tasks.businessPrompt: Implement a PII retention and erasure request workflow that identifies customer records across contacts, accounts, cases, orders, invoices, activities, consent preferences, and audit exceptions.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Privacy request staged with retention exceptions, owner tasks, and audit-safe result.

tasks.title: Cross-system audit timeline
tasks.businessPrompt: Create a cross-system audit timeline that assembles account, order, case, invoice, compliance, owner task, and customer-message events into one verified chronology.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Audit timeline published with sorted events, source links, and customer-safe status.
